### Market Narrative

**India is in distress.** Both major indices (NIFTY, BANKNIFTY) are R4 — explosive, momentum-driven selling. This is not a pullback; it is a regime that persists until selling exhausts itself. Income structures on indices will face max-loss events. Cash is the correct position.

**Notable:** TCS is R1 (calm) while NIFTY is R4 (explosive). IT services are stabilizing before the broader market — consistent with historical pattern where export-oriented, dollar-earning businesses recover first. TCS is the first deployment candidate for India capital.

### INDIA VERDICT: WAIT

NIFTY is R4 at 100% confidence. This is an explosive regime — income structures on the index will face max-loss events. Daily ATR of 2.1% implies ±470 point swings.

**Do not deploy on indices until NIFTY transitions to R2.**
